headline: IBM and Arm Collaborate on Enterprise AI Infrastructure
lede: The two computing giants are joining forces to integrate Arm architecture into IBM Z and LinuxONE systems. This partnership targets dual-architecture hardware designed for high-performance enterprise AI and data-intensive workloads.

headline: Viewers Ditch Broadcast TV for YouTube and AI Companions
lede: New data confirms a sharp decline in traditional television viewership among adult men in the UK. Algorithmic content platforms are rapidly displacing legacy broadcast models as primary sources for entertainment and productivity.

headline: Integrating Clojure into the Modern Java Stack
lede: One engineering team shares their process for adopting Lisp-based development within a rigid corporate environment. By leveraging the REPL and code-as-data, they successfully streamlined their custom business logic.

headline: Artemis II Mission Executes Key Launch Milestones
lede: The Orion spacecraft has successfully cleared the pad, embarking on a critical test flight toward the Moon. This mission evaluates life-support and navigational systems essential for the future of human presence in deep space.

headline: The Reality of High-Stakes Phishing Campaigns
lede: An account takeover attempt highlights the dangerous evolution of MFA fatigue and social engineering. Attackers are now combining legitimate-looking support cases with pixel-perfect mirrors to bypass standard user skepticism.

headline: Evaluating Modern Email Obfuscation Strategies
lede: Automated harvesting bots have rendered many classic obfuscation techniques obsolete. This guide benchmarks current methods, from CSS styling to AES encryption, for developers securing contact information.

headline: Open Source Compromise Hits AI Startup Mercor
lede: A breach of the LiteLLM library has exposed vulnerabilities in the AI supply chain. The incident serves as a warning on the risks inherent in widely distributed project dependencies.

headline: Linux Gaming Reaches Record Market Share on Steam
lede: Valve’s latest survey reports that Linux gaming presence has surged past five percent of the user base. Hardware trends indicate a heavy preference for AMD processors among these expanding Linux ranks.

headline: New Quantum Breakthroughs Threaten Classical Encryption
lede: Recent progress in fault-tolerant quantum computing has significantly reduced the qubit requirements for breaking standard elliptic curve cryptography. Researchers at Caltech and Google have identified more efficient pathways to Shor’s algorithm implementation.

headline: EmDash Challenges WordPress With Sandboxed Architecture
lede: This new TypeScript-based content management system prioritizes security by isolating plugins within isolated execution environments. By reimagining the CMS for a serverless age, it aims to eliminate the vulnerabilities common in traditional PHP ecosystems.
pullquote: The next generation of web publishing must prioritize isolated execution over monolithic plugin dependencies
